description: A legal order, decree, or official ledger establishing or tracking monthly child support financial obligations.

case_number.instruction: The court case number or state registry identification number associated with the child support file.

obligor_name.instruction: The full name of the parent legally obligated to pay the child support. May be labeled as Payor or Defendant.

obligee_name.instruction: The full name of the parent or guardian receiving the child support. May be labeled as Payee, Recipient, or Plaintiff.

payment_frequency.instruction: How often payments are due, such as Monthly, Semi-Monthly, or Weekly.

base_support_amount.instruction: The recurring base dollar amount ordered for child support per payment cycle, excluding arrears or medical add-ons.

effective_date.instruction: The date on which the support obligation begins, or the date the current ledger history starts.
